description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named sonarcloud scan that runs on pushes to master and dev branches and on pull request events. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up JDK 11, downloads and sets up sonar-scanner and build-wrapper, prepares a cfamily cache timestamp, caches cfamily and conan files, installs dependencies, configures the project with cmake, runs a build-wrapper, tests with ctest, generates coverage with make gcov, and runs sonar-scanner.
